description: Composition Blue hooded sweatshirt made of 75% cotton and 25% polyester fleece, has drawstrings for the hood, long raglan sleeves with the 3-Stripe, a zippered placket, 3-Stripe on the chest, two pockets on the front and printed branding above the ribbed hem Fit Comfort Wash care Wash below 40 degrees separately Do not dry clean, soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Proudly display your love for spors twith this bright hooded sweatshirt from adidas. Whether you play or just love watching the game, this hoodie is for you. The cotton blend fabric has a fleecy back making it soft and cosy next to your skin. Layer this over tracks or jeans for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
